questions.question: Please provide Candidate name shown in the header.
Please provide Primary email shown near the top.
Please provide School name for each education entry.
Please provide Major for each education entry.
Please provide Degree label for each education entry.
Please provide Role label shown on the project row.
Please provide Short technology list for the project heading.
Please provide Bullets describing contribution and impact.
Please provide GitHub link if it strengthens the profile.
Please provide Two to three summary bullets.
